grades.expectation: Response mentions CQS training requirements for all conveyancing staff
grades.reason: Clearly mentions mandatory CQS training modules within first 6 months covering ethics, client care, risk management, and conveyancing best practices

grades.expectation: Response covers protocol awareness and compliance training
grades.reason: Specifically mentions training on Conveyancing Protocol, CQS procedures and standards, and adherence to core practice standards

grades.expectation: Response mentions supervision requirements for new staff
grades.reason: Details documented supervision policy with named supervisor, regular file reviews, and SRO oversight

grades.expectation: Response references the need to maintain training records as CQS evidence
grades.reason: States firm should record training completions and mentions documenting training for CQS audit compliance

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes CQS firm-level requirements from individual SRA competence
grades.reason: Response focuses entirely on CQS firm requirements without distinguishing these from individual SRA competence requirements
